what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named p-49 in the design-source channel; it records the asset's channel path, content-addressed blob, MIME type, dimensions, provenance, author session, creation time, and declares it as source design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter defines an image ledger entry with id recent-pitches/p-49 and address image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-49
References a blob://b2:8378a8738236c3ca7c24f4ad5545cf09 object with mime image/jpeg
Width and height are both recorded as 0
Source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Body text states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-49.jpg'
standouts: Explicitly labeled as SOURCE design ground-truth
Content-addressed image asset with channel/path identity
Dimensions are zero despite being an image record
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, dimensions, source, author_session, created, and links
Separates machine-readable metadata from a short human-readable source note
Filename follows image__<channel>_<path>.md with path slashes converted to underscores
concerns: w and h are 0, suggesting missing image dimension extraction
links is empty, so no explicit relationships are recorded
The blob reference cannot be verified from this file alone
notes: A metadata stub that registers a design-source pitch image by blob ID and marks it as ground-truth material.
questions: Why are width and height zero for an image record?
Is the blob resolvable and what does the image depict?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record source design ground-truth for a pitch image; the file does that, but it lacks extracted dimensions and linked relationships.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, addressable ledger entry for a design image so it can be referenced as authoritative source material within the recent-pitches collection.
novelty: Explicitly labels the image as SOURCE design ground-truth rather than derived or annotated content.
contribution: It contributes a stable, addressable metadata record that maps a channel/path identity to a content-addressed blob and records authorship, creation time, and source intent for the image.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for the design-source image recent-pitches/p-49, referencing a JPEG blob and declaring it as source design ground-truth.
intention_for_embedding: To register and preserve provenance for a pitch image as authoritative design-source material.
